hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *pnpm-lock.yaml) echo 'pnpm-lock.yaml is generated - run pnpm commands instead of editing it' >&2; exit 2;; esac

input=$(cat); echo "$input" | jq -e '.stop_hook_active == true' >/dev/null 2>&1 && exit 0; git diff --quiet HEAD -- '*.ts' '*.tsx' 2>/dev/null && [ -z "$(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- '*.ts' '*.tsx')" ] && exit 0; echo 'Uncommitted TS changes at turn end: run the rules-reviewer subagent on the diff, apply its findings, then commit via caveman-commit.' >&2; exit 2

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.mjs|*.cjs) ./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; out=$(./node_modules/.bin/oxlint "$f" 2>&1) || { echo "$out" >&2; exit 2; };; esac
